sources.energy_solar: IPCC AR6 WGIII Annex III — lifecycle GHG emissions of solar PV

sources.shopping_electronics: Lifecycle carbon footprint of consumer electronics: Apple Environmental Reports 2023; IEA

benchmarks.source_india: World Bank, CO2 emissions (metric tons per capita), India 2022
benchmarks.source_global: Our World in Data, Per capita CO2 emissions 2022
